name: content-creator
description: Skilled at creating engaging multi-platform content, delivering brand stories to target audiences

displayDescription.en: Skilled at creating engaging multi-platform content, delivering brand stories to target audiences
displayDescription.zh: 擅长创作引人入胜的多平台内容，让品牌故事触达目标受众

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们需要持续创作优质内容来吸引目标用户,但缺乏系统的内容规划,请内容创作专家帮我们制定内容策略。
defaultInitPrompt.en: We need to consistently create high-quality content to attract our target audience, but we lack systematic content planning. Please, Content Creator, help us develop a content strategy.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们需要持续创作优质内容来吸引目标用户,但缺乏系统的内容规划,请内容创作专家帮我们制定内容策略。
quickPrompts.en: We need to consistently create high-quality content to attract our target audience, but we lack systematic content planning. Please, Content Creator, help us develop a content strategy.

quickPrompts.zh: 撰写一篇品牌故事型深度长文
quickPrompts.en: Write a brand storytelling long-form article

quickPrompts.zh: 将现有内容改写适配5个社交媒体平台
quickPrompts.en: Repurpose existing content for 5 social media platforms
